symptoms.symptom_name: Sub-acute-on-chronic proximal muscle weakness (hips, thighs, shoulders)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Proximal myopathy from cortisol-driven muscle protein catabolism is a classic feature of hypercortisolism.
Potassium wasting in hypercortisolism can worsen proximal weakness and needs urgent electrolytes.

symptoms.symptom_name: Central weight gain with a rounder, plethoric face and thin limbs

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Central adiposity with a rounded plethoric face and relatively thin extremities is characteristic of glucocorticoid excess.

symptoms.symptom_name: Broad violaceous abdominal striae, easy bruising and thin fragile skin

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Broad (>1 cm) purple striae, easy bruising and thin skin from protein catabolism are relatively specific for hypercortisolism.
Cortisol-driven secondary hypertension; patient-obtainable home reading, admissible in telehealth but unverified.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Severe hypertensive episode / possible hypertensive emergency
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A home systolic of ~190 with a severe headache is a red flag that cannot be excluded as a hypertensive emergency remotely.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Severe hypertensive episode / possible hypertensive emergency
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Severe headache with markedly elevated blood pressure raises concern for hypertensive encephalopathy or another intracranial process.

symptoms.symptom_name: New agitation and mood lability, out of character

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Neuropsychiatric disturbance is a recognised feature of hypercortisolism but is non-specific.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Severe hypertensive episode / possible hypertensive emergency
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Acute behavioural change with severe hypertension raises concern for hypertensive encephalopathy.

symptoms.symptom_name: Denies any corticosteroid use (tablets, creams, inhalers, injections)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Explicit denial of steroid use makes an exogenous cause unlikely and points to endogenous hypercortisolism.

symptoms.symptom_name: Proximal power 3/5 in hip flexors and shoulder abductors

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Objective proximal myopathy - a sealed clinician examination finding the AI Doctor cannot obtain remotely.

symptoms.symptom_name: Clinician-measured BP 185/105, dorsocervical fat pad, plethoric moon facies on examination

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Sealed clinician examination findings; the AI Doctor infers the pattern from history and patient-offered data, never from a measured vital or a palpated sign.

symptoms.symptom_name: Failure to suppress on low-dose dexamethasone suppression / elevated morning cortisol and ACTH

investigation_details.investigation_name: Low-dose dexamethasone suppression test; morning serum cortisol and ACTH
investigation_details.expected_result: Failure to suppress cortisol / elevated cortisol confirming hypercortisolism
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Hypercortisolism cannot be confirmed; this is arranged by the in-person clinician, not obtainable via telehealth in real time.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Biochemical confirmation of hypercortisolism - the diagnostic anchor, only available after in-person/laboratory work-up.

investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: A severe, treatable electrolyte disturbance could be missed; requires urgent in-person bloods.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Potassium wasting in hypercortisolism can drive profound weakness; unobtainable via telehealth.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Central adiposity with thin limbs, proximal myopathy and broad purple striae with easy bruising together strongly suggest glucocorticoid excess.

symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: Severe hypertensive episode / possible hypertensive emergency
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Severe home hypertension with a severe headache and new agitation cannot be excluded as a hypertensive emergency remotely and drives the escalation.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Urgent in-person blood pressure measurement and neurological examination
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: A home BP of 190/110 with a severe headache and agitation must be measured and assessed in person to exclude a hypertensive emergency / end-organ damage.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Serum electrolytes (potassium) and comprehensive metabolic panel
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: To exclude severe hypokalaemia contributing to the weakness.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Morning cortisol, ACTH and low-dose dexamethasone suppression test
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: To confirm hypercortisolism - arranged by the in-person clinician / endocrinology, not obtainable via telehealth.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: AI Doctor independently confirming the diagnosis or 'reading' a blood pressure number as diagnostic
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: The AI cannot measure vitals or run biochemistry; over-claiming a confirmed diagnosis or a measured value would be a fabrication.
